title: Orange Frasgle and the Blackberry Seed
summary: When Orange Frasgle gets a blackberry seed painfully stuck in his many sharp teeth, he must visit the Frasgle Dentist in the vibrant Rainbow Frasgle World. Through careful flossing and extensive brushing, the red-colored dentist successfully removes the obstruction. Accompanied by his mother and his friends Superhero Izzy, Seeker, and Hattie the Mouse, the relieved Orange Frasgle decides to head back to his cozy house in the forest for a well-deserved nap.

highlightQuote.text: Different animals into different animals. It only works if you say a rhyme.

transcript.text: Different animals into different animals. It only works if you say a rhyme.
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: Oh. That's a powerful magic wand you've got there.
Yeah. But it's really fragile, too.
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: Oh, it is, I see. All right. Are you ready for Stars and Stories?
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: Yes. I'll turn the lamp off. Turn it on. I'll turn it off.
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: Okay. Stars and stories.

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Okay. Now, where were we? We were at the part where they were sipping the potion and Izzy was sipping the water.
And why was Izzy sipping the water instead of the potion?
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: Because, she, actually, she was going to fly there with her cape. Fly where? To the Frasgle... to the Rainbow Frasgle world. A Rainbow Frasgle said, 'What's the problem, Orange Frasgle?'
And Orange Frasgle said, 'Arrgh,' which meant 'I have something stuck between my teeth and I don't know what it is and it kind of hurts.'
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: It must be a blackberry seed. We just got... Arrgh! Arrgh!
What do we have to do? Said Frasgle. 'Ow! Ow!' said Frasgle. 'That hurts!'
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: Oh, yes. Take a sip, try that, and then you can try a flosser. Arrgh!
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: And Frasgle tried the flosser, but he couldn't get it out.
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: Now you try brushing your teeth. Ch-ch-ch-ch. Now you take a sip. Gulp, gulp, gulp. Brush, brush, brush, brush, brush, brush, brush.
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: And it took a long time to brush Frasgle's teeth because, as everyone knows, Frasgles have a huge number of sharp teeth because they have such big mouths that are full of teeth. But after a while, Frasgle started to smile as he brushed. Brush, brush, brush. Arrgh! Brush, brush, brush. Arrgh! And then he took a big drink of water and spat.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: And the dent- the Frasgle Dentist looked over and he peaked inside Frasgle's mouth and he looked up and said, 'I think you've got it out!' And Frasgle said, 'Arrgh!' and that meant, 'Thank you so much, Frasgle Dentist. It was really helpful and it was so stuck in there and it was so uncomfortable, but I'm really glad that we fixed the problem.'
And then Mama Frasgle says, 'How are you doing, Frasgle?'
transcript.speaker: Izzy

transcript.text: And Frasgle said, 'Arrgh,' pretty good, but I'm kind of tired. The dentist was a lot. What can we do now? said Frasgle.
transcript.speaker: Dad

transcript.text: You can just take a nap.
transcript.speaker: Izzy
Dad
transcript.text: Arrgh! And so Frasgle and his mom went out of the dentist's office, and there they saw Superhero Izzy and Seeker and Hattie the Mouse. And they were all in Rainbow Frasgle World for the first time. And Orange Frasgle was an orange Frasgle, but he saw all around Frasgles of different colors. Like what color was the Frasgle dentist?

transcript.speaker: Izzy
transcript.text: Um, red. He was a red Frasgle. And there were purple Frasgles, and there were blue... and red Frasgles. And every color, and green, and pink and purple, indigo and violet, and silver and gold. Those are all the colors I can imagine.

And Frasgle, Orange Frasgle, was very relieved to have his problem with his teeth all fixed. And so he decided to take a nap. But his home is back in our world, in a little house in the forest with all the other Stars and Stories creatures, not on Rainbow Frasgle World. And so he said, 'Arrgh, maybe we should go home.'
transcript.speaker: Dad
Izzy
transcript.text: That's the end of Stars and Stories, Dada.

transcript.speaker: Dad
transcript.text: Yeah, that's the end. That was a short one.

characters.name: Orange Frasgle
characters.description: A creature with many sharp teeth who gets a seed stuck in his mouth.

characters.name: Rainbow Frasgle
characters.description: A resident of Rainbow Frasgle World who greets Orange Frasgle.

characters.name: Frasgle Dentist
characters.description: A red Frasgle who helps remove the stuck blackberry seed.

characters.name: Mama Frasgle
characters.description: The mother of Orange Frasgle who accompanies him to the dentist.

characters.name: Superhero Izzy
characters.description: Isabella’s brave, caped alter-ego is a courageous guardian of the kaleidoscopic Rainbow Frasgle World. A soaring protector, she descends from the vibrant skies alongside a crew of talking cats to lend their whiskered wisdom and help Seeker restore order to the unfolding house chaos.

characters.name: Seeker
characters.description: A brave dwarven explorer and mediator, he resides in a glowing castle hub—a multiversal dock for skyships anchored within the skyline of New York City. From this urban sanctum, he conducts silver slime experiments and tends to wandering cats amidst a massive library. Frequently swapping between a red coat and a mystical purple cloak, his braided red beard remains his most eccentric tool, capable of catching small fish. A master of fusion, he combines ancient stone-craft with high-velocity mechanics, utilizing a legendary magic ladder to scale the shifting architecture of the realms. Whether brewing portal potions, harvesting floof-berries in Limbo with gemstone goggles, or aiding Buddy the Mouse, this walnut-loving student of the stars remains the hero who orchestrated the daring rescue of the world.

characters.name: Hattie the Mouse
characters.description: A nimble, friendly mouse of Possible Street and loyal friend to Izzy and Seeker, this brave artisan is the wife of Dimitar and mistress of the Workshop of Hats—a weathered hollow tree sanctuary on Cornell Street scented with cedar, ink, and peanut butter toast. Clad in her signature red cloak and pointy hat, she is a resourceful hatmaker whose spirit was forged against massive diggers and the rain-slicked Floofer Cloud. Within her paint-stained home, she carefully curates her husband’s library alongside her own hand-painted volumes while confronting a baffling supply mystery; the discovery of curious clover stickers signals a gathering shadow of intrigue she is determined to unravel.

places.name: Rainbow Frasgle World
places.description: A colorful world inhabited by Frasgles of every imaginable hue.

places.name: Dentist's Office
places.description: The place where the Frasgle Dentist performs procedures like tooth brushing and flossing.

places.name: House in the Forest
places.description: The home where Orange Frasgle and other creatures live.
